title: Status change depending on the result of a formula
excerpt:
Is it possible according to the result of a formula to change the status of another column? 
For example, if the result is Tru, change the status of the “Status” column to “Yes.” 
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: ehudshem (Ehud)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: rosaly (Rose @ Sayn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t believe I see that in the options. But they have an upcoming webinar for automations… maybe you can ask there.

posts.author: rosaly (Rose @ Sayn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh actually it’s in the roadmap so it looks like they’re working on adding this feauture:

Include formula columns in automation recipes Feature requests
We would love to ability to have a simple “if text contains” formula that could update a status column. For instance: if a text contains “ABC” then update status to “ABC”. This would help us use the color-coding that the status column offers to keep better track of our tasks. I realize this is a pretty simple feature request, but it would help us in many of our processes, especially as our boards grow and we rely more heavily on at-a-glance views of our boards.
